name: Quicklizard Ltd
summary: Quicklizard Ltd, an AI technology solution provider, offers a portfolio of solutions for dynamic pricing analysis and management. The company offers Quicklizard, a SaaS-based solution platform for product data management, competitive intelligence, and dynamic pricing. It serves the retail and E-commerce, airline and travel, brands and B2B, and omnichannel industries worldwide. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Petah Tikva, Israel.
